zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Smythe於1377年之後出生在英國蘇格蘭時，她的父親Sir John Smyth II8629歲，母親Joan De Willoughby8624歲。她於1411年與Sir John III Smith 14th PGGF在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾諾維爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1434年8月10日在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾藍布利。

nameMeanings.name: Smythe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Smith
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name denoting a worker in metal, especially iron, such as a blacksmith or farrier, from Middle English smith ‘smith’ (Old English smith, probably a derivative of smītan ‘to strike, hammer’). Early examples are also found in the Latin form Faber . Metal-working was one of the earliest occupations for which specialist skills were required, and its importance ensured that this term and its equivalents in other languages were the most widespread of all occupational surnames in Europe. Medieval smiths were important not only in making horseshoes, plowshares, and other domestic articles, but above all for their skill in forging swords, other weapons, and armor. This is also the most frequent of all surnames in the US. It is very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below). This surname (in any of the two possible English senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti. See also Smither .

English: from Middle English smithe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smiththe). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, occupational, for someone who worked in one, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Smitha in King's Nympton (Devon). Compare Smithey .
Irish and Scottish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac Gobhann, Irish Mac Gabhann ‘son of the smith’. See McGowan .

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Smythe was born after 1377, in Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Smyth II, was 8629 and her mother, Joan De Willoughby, was 8624. She married Sir John III Smith 14th PGGF in 1411, in Norwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 10 August 1434, in Lambley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Sir John III Smith 14th PGGF en 1411, à Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. ko.lifeSummary: Joane Smythe(이)가 1377년 이후 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Smyth II(은)는 8629세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan De Willoughby(은)는 8624세였다. 그녀는 1411년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 노웰에서 Sir John III Smith 14th PGGF(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1434년 8월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 램리에서 사망했다.

ru.Carlton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, Engla: карлтон он трент, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Smythe родилась после 1377 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Smyth II было 8629 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan De Willoughby, 8624. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John III Smith 14th PGGF в 1411 г. в местности норвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 10 августа 1434 г. в местности лэмбли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
